description: Send notifications to your own Opsgenie destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise opsgenie:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Opsgenie Alerts API {message} payload delivered straight to api.opsgenie.com.
name: msg-to-opsgenie

request.template: {"urls":"opsgenie://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and " — " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"description":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and " — " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"description":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *}}
